title: Local declaration should hide package wildcard import

features.name: package enum typedef with single-bit enum item
features.description: Code should include a package containing a typedef enum with a single-bit enum item that has an explicit value

features.name: wildcard import from package
features.description: Code should include a wildcard import statement that imports all items from a package into the current scope

features.name: localparam shadowing imported package item
features.description: Code should include a localparam declared in a module that has the same name as an enum item imported via wildcard from a package
